🟢 Prepare a month's worth content plan with a few clicks.

🟢 Complete a detail financial analysis in minutes.
🟢 Automate 1000s of such write and research work.

You have access to 2900 ready-to-use prompt templates,  smart prompt writer to create reusable dynamic prompt templates and prompt and GPT organizer to manage and access everything in a central dashboard 🚀

Minimalist design and specific features:

1️⃣ Prompt Library: Free access to prompt library with 2900 vetted and tested high quality ChatGPT prompt templates to write anything from blog post to research papers.

2️⃣ Smart Prompt Editor: Smart and feature-packed prompt editor to create and deploy high quality prompt templates in minutes.

Prompmatic is easy-to-use and absolutely non-intrusive. Try today.

Designed for Ideao document camera, IdeaoCam let you take snapshots and create amazing video with ease! Connect with your Goolgle account, and access your file anywhere, anytime. IdeaoCam allows you to upload pictures directly onto your Google Drive, or use with Google Classroom to create assignments.

•	Control Ideao Camera
Perform up to 6x zoom to get a close-up shot. Rotate in 0°/90°/180°/270° to get the right displaying angle. Flip and mirror the video when turning the document camera into the front-facing webcam mode. Freeze the image to avoid any interference. The intuitive menu bar let you control the Ideao document camera at your fingertips.

•	Snapshot and Record
Take snapshots and record videos in the selected resolution. IdeaoCam offers the easiest way to digitize your content in picture and video format, no matter you are using IdeaoCam for live demo or pre-recorded sessions.

•	Stop Motion Video
Create eye-catching stop motion video becomes easier than ever before! Featuring Onion Skinning to let you see through the frames and compare the keyframes to make perfect stop motion. All you need to do is taking pictures, adjust the frame per second, and export the stop motion video. It is that simple.

•	Connect with Google Drive and Google Classroom
Sign in and access your Google Drive or Google Classroom. Every snapshot and video you make, you can save directly onto the cloud drive without hassle; or assign as quiz, assignment, or announcement. Enjoy the seamless integration with Google to help your lesson preparation more effective.

mei's lens provides search the web by image feature for web pages.

「mei's lens」provides search the web by image feature for web pages.

With 「mei's lens」you could do the following stuff.
- Pick & select image for searching by image.
- Comes with light / dark mode.

※ Usage instructions:
1. Turn on「mei's lens」by context menu or browser bar icon.（「mei's lens」will apply image directly once tap image context menu）.「mei's lens」 will ask for google account login for 1st time usage. (This is just for recording request count only)
2. Switch mode to select area which you like to search.

※ How to switch main image source？
1. Drag & drop image file or web page element into main image section.
2. Focus main image section then paste url、image、html string on it.
3. Double click main image section to pick up image you like.

※ Keyboard shortcuts:
- 「ctrl」+「shift」+「L」: toggle「mei's lens」.
-  「esc」: turn off「mei's lens」.

※ Related videos:
- Tutorial: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=jjUhkBtMGF4
- Switch image source: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SDS85iuBDlk

Enjoy it.

※ Change Log:
1.0.5:
  a. Add identity permission to connect with user's google account. (This is just for recording request count only)

1.0.4:
  a. Add options page for customize appearance.

1.0.3:
  a. Keyboard shortcut: 「esc」for turn off「mei's lens」.
  b. Performance enhancement.

1.0.2:
  a. Keyboard shortcut: 「ctrl」+「shift」+「L」 for toggle「mei's lens」.
  b. Add several ways to switch image source. User can copy / paste url、image、html string on main image when focus on it. Besides that，DnD also support drag file or web element into main image to switch its source.

1.0.1
  a. fix: data normalize.

Polygraf AI Content Detector: Advanced Plagiarism & ChatGPT Detector
Get Free Polygraf AI content detector with plagiarism checker to identify ChatGPT, Gemini, Mistral, Llama, Grammarly.

Get Free Polygraf AI content detector with plagiarism checker to identify top AI models.

Get instant content verification with the Polygraf AI Content Detector, now with exciting new features in our year-end update! This extension will help you to identify AI-generated text in real time and humanize, summarize your text directly within the tool. Whether you're an editor, writer, student, marketeer, or just a curious browser, Polygraf AI Content Detector Chrome extension lets you check the authenticity of your digital content everywhere you work. Upgrade to use advanced features. 
We've introduced some major upgrades:
Fresh New Design: A sleek interface to make your workflow seamless.
Scan Anything, Anywhere: Highlight text and click our yellow Polygraf icon for instant detection—it's always right where you need it.
Text Editing Magic: Edit and scan text in one space, no more tab-hopping!


For Standard/Premium Plan Holders:
Instant Summaries: Get quick summaries for any text.
Humanizer (Beta): Transform AI-generated text into natural, human-like content, ensuring it's ready for any authenticity checks.


Polygraf remains the world's most detailed AI Content Detector, capable of identifying content generated by top AI models and with greater than 98% accuracy. It's the only detector that can distinguish Grammarly-enhanced text from AI-generated content, providing unmatched accuracy for professionals and students alike.
Easy Installation:
Click 'Add to Chrome'
Pin the Polygraf AI Detector to your extension bar
Log in using Google or Sign up with your email
Highlight text and click the extension icon to start detecting with our ChatGPT and Plagiarism checker.


Key Features:
AI Checker Free Version: Enjoy robust detection capabilities at no cost with the free version of our AI detector, including features like the ChatGPT detector and Grammarly detection with monthly renewing limited tokens.
AI Detection: Add Polygraf Google Chrome extension in seconds and use Polygraf AI Detection to identify Human or AI-generated content in real-time, including a precise ChatGPT detector for pinpointing AI-created text, and a plagiarism checker for identifying unoriginal content. Polygraf accurately shows ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and other gen-AI
AI Source Detection: Patent-pending Polygraf AI Content Detector will tell you whether the content was artificially generated, enhanced by Grammarly, or created by specific AI models like ChatGPT, functioning as an effective plagiarism detector as well.
Writing Style Analysis: Evaluates text on 6 parameters:
Perplexity: measures text complexity. (Higher tends to be Human)
Readability: indicates sentence structure complexity.
Vocabulary richness: reflects word diversity. (Higher tends to be AI, especially if altered by Grammarly)
Syntactic tree depth: assesses text predictability. (Higher tends to be AI)
Average sentence length: shows typical word count per sentence. (Higher tends to be AI)
Average word length: represents the average length of words used. (Higher tends to be AI)


Unmatched Accuracy: Boasts over 98% accuracy with a minimal false positive rate.
Versatile LLM Detection: Recognizes content generated by top AI models.
Detailed Reports: Generates comprehensive reports to verify the originality of your content, leveraging both ChatGPT checker and plagiarism checker functionalities.
Deception Filter (Web interface only): Detects intentional and unintentional text modifications aimed at deceiving AI models, such as empty spaces between words, deliberate grammatical errors, or alterations by Grammarly.
Copyright Detector (Web interface only): Detects the original source of the content, providing URLs and exact sentence or phrase matches from the source, acting as a powerful plagiarism detector.


How It Works:
Polygraf AI uses proprietary AI protocols extensively trained on human and AI-generated content. Our real-time AI text detector can identify nuanced patterns in text to distinguish between human and AI authorship, even for Grammarly-enhanced text.
Real-time Detector: Verifies content origins in real-time across multiple models.
Probability Assessment: Provides insights into the origin, trustworthiness, and whether content was human-written or AI-enhanced.
Forensic Linguistic Analysis: Traces machine-generated text back to its original source material.
Intuitive Interface: Features easy-to-use dashboards, direct source links, and clear similarity percentages.




Premium Features:
Unlock the full potential of Polygraf with a premium subscription:
AI Source Detector: Identify which AI tool (e.g., ChatGPT) created the content.
Copyright Detector: Protect your work by identifying the original copyright holder.
AI Highlighter: See exactly which parts of your content are AI-generated.
Advanced Plagiarism Detector: Check for deeper plagiarism issues (web only).
Website AI Analysis: Instantly verify AI usage on websites.


Why Choose Polygraf?
The Best Detection Accuracy: Our AI Detector boasts an impressive >98% accuracy rate in internal tests, setting a benchmark in the industry. Polygraf is trusted by government agencies and businesses worldwide for its ChatGPT detector and plagiarism detector capabilities.
Unique Features: Did you know that Polygraf is the only AI detector that can tell if the content was enhanced by Grammarly or created by generative AI models like ChatGPT? This can be critical, protecting you against misinformation, propaganda, and claims of academic misconduct & copyright infringement with our advanced plagiarism checker.
Trust & Data Security: We don't train our models on your data. This means we never store your information, making Polygraf a trusted, 100% secure AI Detector. Our ChatGPT detector, Grammarly detection, and plagiarism checker functionalities ensure your content remains original and credible.
By integrating a powerful ChatGPT detector, plagiarism detector, and Grammarly detection, Polygraf stands out as a comprehensive tool for anyone serious about maintaining the authenticity of their digital content.

OSHIStamp: YouTube Video Timestamp Creation & AI Summary Tool
YouTube Video Timestamp Creation & AI Summary Tool

YouTube Video: Timestamp Creation Assistant Tool

This is a free tool that assists with creating timestamps for YouTube videos.

With intuitive controls, you can easily create and edit timestamps, and for advanced users, quick tasks using keyboard shortcuts are also available.

Additionally, with the AI summary and the per-video saved memo list, you can jump to the corresponding video with a single click, allowing smooth access to previously created timestamps.

It helps make your fan activities more enjoyable and convenient. Please make use of it!


🔧Main Features:

✅️Insert Timestamps
　Click the ⏱️ button while watching a video to insert the current time at the cursor position.

✅️Change Timestamp Format
　You can choose from the following two formats for the timestamps:
　- Short format (e.g., 2:30, 1:45:15)
　- Full format (e.g., 00:02:30, 01:45:15)
　※ When adjusting by ±1 second using shortcuts(CTRL + SHIFT/ALT + ↑↓), the selected format will be applied.

✅️Jump from Timestamps
　Clicking on a timestamp link will move the video to that time.

✅️Fast Forward / Rewind
　You can choose from preset durations (1s, 5s, 10s, 1min, 5min, 10min) using buttons. Shortcut keys (Ctrl + Shift / Alt + ←→) are also supported. One custom duration can be added as well.

✅️Playback Speed
　Playback speed can be selected from 0.5x, 1x, 1.5x, 2x, or 2.5x using buttons.

✅️AI Summarization
　Leverage Google AI Studio (e.g. Gemini API) to semi‑automatically summarize the content of captioned videos.

　Limitations
　- Video length: under 12 hours
　- Caption file required 
　- Breaks required for continuous use (due to Google AI Studio API rate limits)

✅️Video Screenshot
　You can download a screenshot of the video in "PNG format."

✅️Generate Timestamp Links
　Copy a link that starts playback from the current time to your clipboard with one click.

✅️Copy Timestamp
　Copy the created timestamp to the clipboard with one click.

✅️Video playback time and current time display with toggle
　You can view the video playback time in real time on the screen. Clicking the playback time switches the display to the current time. The displayed time may have slight discrepancies.

✅️Video-based Auto-Save Function
　Timestamps are automatically saved to local storage as they are created, so there's no worry about losing data during your work.

　Timestamps are saved independently for each video, allowing you to manage timestamps for multiple videos collectively. Additionally, you can jump to the corresponding video with a single click from the per-video saved memo list, allowing smooth access to previously created timestamps.

✅️Backup and Restore
　To ensure your data is carried over in the following scenarios, we provide a backup feature for timestamp data:
　- Reinstalling the extension
　- Reinstalling Chrome
　- Deleting the user profile (user data directory)
　- Reinstalling the OS or migrating to a different OS

　All timestamp data can be exported and imported in JSON format, enabling easy saving and restoration. Automatic backups to Google Drive are also supported.

✅️Color Mode Feature
　Now supports Dark Mode.

✅️Display Fan Images
　Upload your favorite image to display on the screen, boosting motivation for your fan activities!
　(Supported size: 500px × 70px, formats: JPG, PNG, SVG)

✅️Minimize Feature
　Minimize the screen to the bottom right when not in use.


👉️Keyboard Shortcuts（CTRL + SHIFT or ALT）:

･CTRL + SHIFT/ALT + S: Insert timestamp
･CTRL + SHIFT/ALT + K: Toggle play/pause
･CTRL + SHIFT/ALT + →: Skip forward by selected amount
･CTRL + SHIFT/ALT + ←: Skip backward by selected amount
･CTRL + SHIFT/ALT + ↑: Increase selected timestamp by 1s, 10s, 1m, or 10m (multiple values can be selected)
･CTRL + SHIFT/ALT + ↓:  Decrease selected timestamp by 1s, 10s, 1m, or 10m (multiple values can be selected)


📝Recent Change Log:

- v2.43.0: 
･Added a popup that displays a list of recent notes when the extension icon is clicked

- v2.42.0: 
･Added file selection by clicking the favorite image area and a link button to the image size optimization tool

- v2.41.0:
･Added timestamp highlighting feature


🔏Privacy and Data Management:

This tool does not collect any user data. All data is saved locally and managed securely.


📌Disclaimer:

The developer is not responsible for any loss or damage caused by the use of this tool. Please use it at your own risk.

O SMVZAP é um CRM para WhatsApp Web com recursos de IA para análise de conversas. Organize seus chats e otimize suas vendas.

Transforme seu WhatsApp Web em uma poderosa máquina de vendas com o SMVzap!

O SMVzap é uma extensão (uma ferramenta extra) que você adiciona no seu Google Chrome para potencializar suas vendas no WhatsApp Web, agora com recursos de Inteligência Artificial (IA) para análise de conversas.

🔍 Destaque para o recurso de IA:
Nossa ferramenta inclui análise de conversas por IA para vendas, fornecendo insights sobre como direcionar a conversa e um relatório com indicadores da possibilidade de fechamento de negócio. Importante: As mensagens são processadas localmente ou de forma segura, não são compartilhadas com terceiros e não armazenamos suas conversas em bancos de dados externos.

Além da IA, você também encontra:

📢 Disparo de mensagens em massa encaminhando mensagens para vários contatos de uma vez.

📋 Organizar os contatos em colunas (Visão Kanban), como um quadro de tarefas, para acompanhar suas vendas.

💻 Abas personalizadas para organizar e encontrar seus contatos mais importantes.

👤 Gestão de perfis e negócios para cada contato.

✅ Separar os contatos em listas, como “clientes novos”, “em negociação”, etc. Assim você consegue segmentar e filtrar contatos com facilidade.

💬 Enviar mensagens até para números que não estão salvos.

🕒 Agendar mensagens para contatos e colunas do seu CRM, no dia e horário que quiser.

🔔 Anotações, lembretes e notificações personalizáveis para cada contato.

📒 Agenda de contatos editável com atalhos rápidos para conversas.

📅 Marcar compromissos com seus clientes.

⚡ Criar respostas rápidas (texto, áudio, imagem, vídeo ou arquivo), para não ter que digitar sempre a mesma coisa.

📊 Acessar relatórios de mensagens enviadas e compromissos marcados.

🗑️ Visualização de mensagens apagadas.

E no fim, por que escolher o SMVzap?

Interface intuitiva e fácil de usar. 100% seguro — aprovado na auditoria de segurança do Google Chrome. Otimiza o seu atendimento e aumenta a produtividade da sua equipe.

👉 Ideal para gestores, gerentes, prospecção comercial e suporte.

 Comece agora grátis e facilite o seu dia a dia!

This Chrome extension allows you to Click-to-Dial phone numbers on web pages, send SMS and fax messages, and schedule web meetings.

With ReachUC Complete, you have the ability to click-to-call phone numbers on any web page in addition to a suite of features designed to boost productivity. This extension enables you to track and make more sales calls by harnessing the features of your cloud PBX from within your Chrome browser.

With ReachUC Complete,  you can:
* Initiate click-to-dial PBX calls or send SMS to any phone number on a web page
* Make outbound phone calls through your desktop, desk phone or mobile phone
* Call, send SMS messages and send faxes from an integrated dial pad
* Schedule Meeting Manager web and video conference meetings with the option to automatically synchronize to your Google Calendar account (or vice versa)
* Save contact information from your Google Contacts to your PBX Contacts list

How Does the Click-to-Call Feature Work?

Hover your mouse over any phone number on the web page. This phone number will be highlighted and produce a pop-up with three options available: Message, Call by WebRTC and Call.
* Message: Gives you the ability to write and send an SMS on your computer without leaving the web page.
* Call by WebRTC: Initiates a phone call on your computer (headphones or headset recommended).
* Call: This option will first call your PBX phone. Pick up your phone and the outbound call will be placed immediately after.

What Are the Benefits of ReachUC Complete?

* Saves time by cutting out the manual process of dialing phone numbers
* Creates a convenient workflow by allowing you to operate PBX calls, SMS messages and faxes solely through your computer with Dialpad and Click-to-Call options
* Automatically synchronizes web and video conference meetings to your Google Calendar so you don’t forget important meetings

NOTE: In order to use this extension, you will need login credentials from a hosted PBX provider that works with ReachUC.  For more information visit http://www.reachuc.com.

Highlite - Make any website your virtual whiteboard.
Highlight, comment, annotate, draw, and share on any web page

Highlite transforms any webpage into an interactive canvas, allowing you to layer insights, feedback, and reminders directly on the source.

Whether you're conducting deep research or giving design feedback, Highlite keeps your thoughts organized right where they belong.

🛡️ Privacy First: Your Data is Yours

Unlike other tools, Highlite is built with a privacy-by-design approach.

    - 100% Local Storage: All your highlights and notes stay on your machine.
    - No Cloud Servers: Nothing is sent to our servers or any third party.
    - Zero Tracking: We don't track your browsing history or collect analytics.

✨ Master Your Workflow with These Features:

    - Precision Highlighting: Use multiple colors to categorize and organize text snippets instantly.
    - Contextual Comments: Pin thoughts to specific sentences or paragraphs so you never forget your initial reaction.
    - Digital Sticky Notes: Leave reminders or "to-do" prompts anywhere on the page.
    - Visual Markup Tools: Use arrows, boxes, and freehand drawing to spotlight UI elements or key data.
    - Zero-Friction Interface: Lightweight, fast, and requires no complex setup. Install and start annotating in seconds.

🎓 Who is it for?

    - Researchers & Students: Cite sources and organize thesis points effortlessly.
    - UX/UI Designers: Provide clear, visual feedback on live staging sites.
    - Content Creators: Curate inspiration and annotate articles for future scripts or posts.
    - Developers: Mark bugs or UI inconsistencies directly on the browser.

Ready to level up your browsing? Click "Add to Chrome" to start your virtual whiteboard today.

Table as CSV - Table Capture

ACTIVATE Extension: Purchase Subscribtion

Hot To Use: 
1.Go to website when you want to export or copy table
2.Click ctrl + right mouse click when you want select table then ctrl +c
3. If you want select random cells click alt + right mouse click then ctrl +c
4.To export table to csv, pdf, google sheets, image, jpeg, microsoft word, doc, clipboard.


Table as CSV - Table Capture is a powerful and versatile chrome extension that empowers you to interact with HTML tables on websites like never before. With this extension Table as CSV - Table Capture, you can effortlessly copy, select, and export HTML tables to various formats, including Microsoft Excel, CSV, Google Sheets, PDF, images, and more. Whether you need to analyze data with Table as CSV, share it with colleagues, or keep a local backup, this extension Table as CSV provides a seamless and user-friendly experience.

Key Features Table as CSV - Table Capture:

-Copy HTML tables with ease and efficiency
-Export tables as CSV to work with data in spreadsheet applications
-Capture tables as images (PNG, JPEG) or PDF for documentation and sharing
-Download tables directly as Excel spreadsheets or CSV files
-Save tables to your clipboard as Markdown for versatile use
-Export tables to Office 365 for further collaboration and integration
-Supports multi-page tables and dynamically loading tables
-Extract tables from PDF files, both local and from the web
